steps.title: Apply the triangle angle sum property
steps.content:
The sum of all interior angles in a triangle equals 180°. With ∠K = 48° and ∠L = 48°, set up the equation:
$$∠J + 48° + 48° = 180°$$

steps.title: Solve for angle J
steps.content:
Simplify the left side:
$$∠J + 96° = 180°$$
Subtract 96° from both sides:
$$∠J = 84°$$
The answer is 84.
